children.heading: Implementation of conservation program; authorization of Secretary and Secretary of Agriculture
children.label: a Implementation of conservation program; authorization of Secretary and Secretary of Agriculture

children.text: shall utilize the land acquisition and other authority under the Fish and Wildlife Act of 1956, as amended [ et seq.], the Fish and Wildlife Coordination Act, as amended [ et seq.], and the Migratory Bird Conservation Act [ et seq.], as appropriate; and16 U.S.C. 742a16 U.S.C. 66116 U.S.C. 715
is authorized to acquire by purchase, donation, or otherwise, lands, waters, or interest therein, and such authority shall be in addition to any other land acquisition authority vested in him.

children.heading: Availability of funds for acquisition of lands, waters, etc.
children.label: b Availability of funds for acquisition of lands, waters, etc.
children.text: Funds made available pursuant to chapter 2003 of title 54 may be used for the purpose of acquiring lands, waters, or interests therein under subsection (a) of this section.
